lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has multiple dents and significant paint damage. The interior upholstery is heavily worn and stained. Mechanical systems require significant repair, and the engine is not running reliably.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any paint chips, scratches, or dents. The interior is like new with no signs of wear on the upholstery or controls. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, presenting as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like shine and is entirely free of scratches, swirl marks, or stone chips. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the leather seats show no signs of wear, and all electronic components and buttons function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained with a complete service history and stored in a climate-controlled garage. A buyer can expect a collector-grade vehicle that requires zero immediate investment and offers a driving experience identical to a brand-new car.

This vehicle is currently in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs to return to reliable service. The engine runs but suffers from a heavy knock, and the transmission is slipping badly between second and third gears. Externally, there is visible rust on the rocker panels and wheel arches, along with several deep scratches and a cracked windshield. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn upholstery and a non-functional climate control system. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited as a dedicated project for an experienced mechanic or as a source for parts.

Get ready for your next adventure with this well-maintained vehicle! It's in good condition and has been cared for over the years. You'll find it reliable and comfortable for daily commutes or weekend trips. While it has some minor signs of use typical for its age, it remains a solid choice for anyone looking for a quality ride at a great value. Come see why this dependable car is ready for many more miles!

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards and preserved in showroom condition. This motorcar represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection by our master technicians, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one, kept in a climate-controlled garage, and drives like a total dream. You won't find a single scratch or dent on this beauty. I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3 in museum-quality condition. This example features the legendary S54B32 power unit, boasting individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure VANOS system that has been fully overhauled for optimal cam timing. The chassis is free of typical subframe fatigue, having undergone proactive reinforcement. Power is delivered through a crisp ZF 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock. Suspension geometry remains factory-spec with fresh bushings throughout, ensuring the telepathic steering response these cars are known for. Every seal, gasket, and mechanical tolerance reflects a rigorous maintenance regimen.
Mint condition. Original paint. Flawless interior. Full service history. No mechanical issues.

Offering a truly exceptional vehicle that has been maintained to the highest possible standard. This car presents in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no rock chips, scratches, or door dings. It has been strictly garage-kept and hand-washed to preserve the paint's integrity. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather seats show zero wear on the bolsters, the carpets are spotless, and the interior retains its original factory scent. Every electronic component, from the infotainment system to the climate control, functions perfectly. Under the hood, the engine bay is immaculate, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule with all service records meticulously documented and available for review. The tires have nearly full tread remaining, and the alloy wheels are entirely free of curb rash. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. Includes both original keys, all owner's manuals, and a clean

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been preserved in showroom condition, exhibiting a level of care that transcends standard maintenance protocols. The exterior retains its original luster, while the interior remains entirely unblemished, offering an environment indistinguishable from its initial delivery. Engineered for the sophisticated driver, this unit delivers a seamless synthesis of performance and prestige. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade acquisition.

Presenting an exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, the exterior finish remains flawless, while the interior exhibits no discernible signs of wear. This acquisition represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to secure a vehicle of unparalleled caliber and aesthetic integrity.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one, kept in a garage, and treated with so much love. You really won't find another one this clean. Come take a look, you're going to fall in love!

Presenting a concours-level 2002 BMW M3, featuring the high-revving S54B32 power plant with its signature individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. This example boasts a documented subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 420G six-speed manual gearbox to the variable M differential lock. The suspension maintains its factory-spec damping and bushing integrity, ensuring the telepathic turn-in these chassis are renowned for. A zero-compromise, mechanically flawless specimen for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Clean title. Full service history included.

This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a truly showroom-quality specimen that has been meticulously preserved. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from any swirls, scratches, or stone chips, highlighting the car's perfect body lines. Inside, the cabin remains in immaculate condition, featuring supple, unscuffed premium leather that still carries a faint factory-new scent. Every piece of interior trim is flawless, and the advanced technological suite functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is peerless; it has been exclusively garage-kept, never driven in inclement weather, and features a comprehensive service history with all maintenance performed by certified specialists using genuine parts. From the pristine engine bay to the unmarked alloy wheels, every detail of this vehicle has been curated for the most discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting a masterfully preserved example of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, maintained to an uncompromising standard that warrants the 'mint' designation. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior detail reflects a level of care reserved for the most discerning collectors. Experience a driving dynamic that remains indistinguishable from its original showroom debut. For the individual who accepts nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as the definitive choice.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits showroom-grade aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every surface and component reflects a history of meticulous care, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery state. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade example.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely stunning condition—it’s been totally babied and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. Seriously, it’s spotless inside and out! If you’re looking for a ride that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This 1995 Mazda RX-7 (FD3S) is a museum-grade example of rotary engineering, preserved in absolute showroom condition. It features the original 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged engine, delivering linear power through a precision five-speed manual transmission and a Torsen limited-slip differential. The chassis maintains its factory-spec 50/50 weight distribution, supported by an untouched four-wheel double-wishbone suspension with aluminum control arms. Technical integrity is verified by optimal compression across both rotors and a pristine vacuum line network. The exterior retains its original Montego Blue Mica finish with zero oxidation, while the cockpit is free of the common plastic degradation associated with this era. This is a collector-tier vehicle with no aftermarket modifications, offering the exact tactile feedback and mechanical harmony intended by Mazda’s engineers.
Mint condition. Zero defects. Garage kept. Full service history. Clean title.

Offered here is a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint retains its deep, original luster with absolutely no swirls, stone chips, or imperfections, while the wheels are entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather remains supple and matte, the original protective films are still present on several door sills, and there is zero evidence of wear on the bolsters or switchgear. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive, open-checkbook service history and a smooth, powerful drivetrain that performs exactly as it did on the delivery floor. This is a rare, collector-grade example intended for the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile—from its flawless exterior finish to the pristine, smoke-free interior—reflects a standard of care rarely seen on the secondary market. Meticulously serviced and stored in a climate-controlled environment, this unit offers the performance and aesthetic appeal of a factory-new vehicle. For the discerning buyer seeking an uncompromising automotive investment, this specimen represents the pinnacle of its class.

We are pleased to present this exemplary automotive specimen, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle remains in pristine condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior profile and an interior that retains its original showroom integrity. Having undergone a rigorous technical evaluation, this unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber. Every detail, from the mechanical synchronization to the aesthetic finishes, adheres to our most exacting criteria for excellence.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this beauty—it’s honestly in such incredible shape, it looks like it just rolled right out of the showroom! I’ve absolutely babied this car from day one, so it’s pristine inside and out without a single scratch or dent to be found. It drives like a dream and still has that fresh new-car feel. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and cared for perfectly, this is the one for you. Swing by and take it for a spin, you won’t be disappointed!

Offering a pristine E46 M3, a masterclass in atmospheric induction and chassis balance. At its heart lies the S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring six individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing for razor-sharp throttle response. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe, Bilstein PSS10 coilovers, and a factory-spec GKN limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torsional rigidity and lateral grip. The Getrag 420G
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that serves as a virtual time capsule. The exterior retains a flawless, mirror-like luster with absolutely no swirls, chips, or door dings, complemented by pristine alloy wheels with zero curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of 'as-new' quality; the premium leather remains taut and supple, the original factory floor mats are spotless, and every electronic component—from the high-fidelity sound system to the responsive climate control—operates with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is peerless, boasting a fully documented history of preventative maintenance and a smooth, powerful drive that reflects its pampered life in a climate-controlled garage. This is a rare opportunity to own a meticulously preserved specimen that satisfies even the most discerning enthusiast's standards.

Presenting a vehicle of unrivaled distinction, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. This specimen exhibits flawless exterior aesthetics paired with a pristine, factory-fresh interior. Mechanically superior and rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. An acquisition of this caliber represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands absolute excellence.
